channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

See photo

Dead animal in road

item.title: Abandoned Delivery Scooter, 11th July
item.description:
Trashed abandoned delivery scooter found again in Shepherdleas Wood; potentially flammable, sharp, dangerous litter. No identifiable numberplate. Unknown model.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dumbreck Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned street works barriers, 11th July
item.description:
These barriers have been here for almost 12 months with no clear reason for their presence. Can they be removed to stop the pavement being obstructed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridgeway Drive, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter, 11th July
item.description:
Tagged graffiti on bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Troughton Road, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Mattress and rubbish dumped, 11th July
item.description:
Rubbish and mattesss dumped. Please put a sign up, at least. This is so distressing as it keeps on happening.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudbury Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I live in brick court old farm place by garden area overlooks the park the trees/bushes have grown so. I h that they are overhanging my fence, would you please be able to cut them down, 11th July
item.description:
Overhanging trees and bushes over my garden from the park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northbourne Court, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass growing through pavement, 11th July
item.description:
Weeds are growing through the pavement on the corner of Vanbrugh Hill and Hawthorne Crescent and trapping rubbish along the building line. The area needs weed removal and a clean‑up to prevent further buildup.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawthorne Crescent, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation affecting elderly and people with buggies, 11th July
item.description:
Over hanging vegetation affecting elderly and people with buggies doing school run and going to train station
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvington Park Graffiti on Park Building and Metal Container next to the building., 11th July
item.description:
Can the graffiti please be removed or painted over?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the triangle of 'greenery' rubbish everywhere, 11th July
item.description:
The council triangle of greenery has been destroyed by people having dumped rubbish there. There was recently works going on ripping up surrounding paving and large machinery parked up overnight alongside so gave people seclusion for fly tipping. A tree has also been hacked in half and the top part left discarded.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rectory Field Crescent, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dead tree next to public footpath, 11th July
item.description:
This large dead tree is next to a busy public footpath. Needs chopping down Will be a danger to the public as autumn and high winds arrive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike blocking pavement, 11th July
item.description:
From yesterday a bike is forcing pushchairs etc on to the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Oglander Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over street, 11th July
item.description:
Upper oakmere out side school covered in rubbish not being swept regularly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown apple trees impeding pathways, 11th July
item.description:
Tree branches hitting pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Braeside, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bins on road, 11th July
item.description:
Since then offices in the building closed a few weeks ago their full bins have been left abandoned on the road causing an obstruction. Also they are smelling and other people now dump their rubbish around them Please clear this away to make it safe and clean. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old printer and box of rubbish, 11th July
item.description:
Fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on the grass, 11th July
item.description:
You have started putting fencing up around the grass area but people are still parking on the grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Alsike Road, 11th July
item.description:
The sofa has been there over a month now and people have started adding to it!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
